ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. There being no appearance the court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Continued To Oct-11-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance Self Represented Plaintiff Jonathan Fortner is sanction $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC has been cont'd to OCT-11-2022. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Continued To Aug-16-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to August 16, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Attorney Ross W. McKissick's Motion To Be Relieved As Counselof Record for plaintiff Jonathan Fortner is GRANTED.

Written order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceedings not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ross Mckissick, moving party.
No other appearances.

Discussed as to why motion was set for Monday, Sept. 28, 2020 when filed on Friday, Sept. 25, 2020 (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Ross Mckissick's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF JONATHAN FORTNER is off calendar for counsel to properly file motion.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
